# License {.unnumbered}

Unless otherwise noted, this book is released under the license:

Creative Commons Attribution–NonCommercial–ShareAlike 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0)

This means you are free to:

* Share — copy and distribute the book in any format.
* Adapt — change, improve, or build on the content.

You must follow these rules:

* Attribution — You must give credit to the original project and mention if you made any changes.
* NonCommercial — You may not use the material to make money.
* ShareAlike — If you modify the content, you must share your version under the same license.

## Simple explanation {.unlisted}

You are welcome to download the book, print it, and share it with friends, family, schools, or community groups.

However, you may not print and sell the book or produce it in large quantities for commercial purposes unless you receive permission from the project maintainers.

Full legal text:
[https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/legalcode](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/legalcode)
